name: Tomb Raider - Definitive Edition
description: As Lara Croft races to save the world from a Maya apocalypse, she must become the Tomb Raider she is destined to be.

name: Cricket 26
description: Featuring the all-new Management Career, a bigger and better Pro Team, in-depth Ashes mode, and expanded control on and off the field from enhanced gameplay and in-depth strategies - Cricket 26 is The Ultimate Showdown.

name: Hollow Knight: Silksong
description: Discover a vast, haunted kingdom in Hollow Knight: Silksong! Explore, fight and survive as you ascend to the peak of a land ruled by silk and song.

name: Little Nightmares III
description: Little Nightmares III is an atmospheric adventure game in which you follow the journey of Low and Alone, two best friends in search of a way out of the Nowhere. In 2 players online cooperation or solo with an A.I., work together to solve puzzles and survive in this nightmarish world.

name: SAND LAND
description: SAND LAND is an action RPG where you become the main character as Beelzebub, a Fiend Prince. Lead your company of heroic misfits and explore the legendary world of SAND LAND created by Akira Toriyama.

name: X-Plane 11
description: Notice：Need to ignore the update prompt.The future of flight simulation is now! X-Plane 11 is the detailed, realistic, and modern simulator you’ve been waiting for. Intuitive user interface, 3-D cockpits, new effects, 3-D sound, living airports and world-wide scenery.

name: GUILTY GEAR -STRIVE-
description: The cutting-edge 2D/3D hybrid graphics pioneered in the Guilty Gear series have been raised to the next level in “GUILTY GEAR -STRIVE-“. The new artistic direction and improved character animations will go beyond anything you’ve seen before in a fighting game!

name: Sim Racing Telemetry - F1 22
description: This content requires the base application Sim Racing Telemetry on Steam in order to run.

name: Clair Obscur: Expedition 33
description: Lead the members of Expedition 33 on their quest to destroy the Paintress so that she can never paint death again. Explore a world of wonders inspired by Belle Époque France and battle unique enemies in this turn-based RPG with real-time mechanics.

name: Easy Red 2
description: Fight massive battles between infantry, armored vehicles, tanks, cannons and planes. Realistically manage your weapons and equipment, coordinate with your squad, and tactically navigate large, fully destructible open world maps. Experience the WW2 in singleplayer, PVP and Co-Op.

name: Wolf Mate
description: Escape from the locked school by solving puzzles while running away from Freya.

name: JDM: Japanese Drift Master
description: Discover Japan’s legendary car culture in JDM: Japanese Drift Master! Take on challenging roads with refined simcade physics, immerse in the story through manga pages, and explore an open world inspired by stunning real-life areas. Every turn invites you to master the art of drift.

name: The First Berserker: Khazan
description: The First Berserker: Khazan is a hardcore action role-playing game. The player will become Khazan, the great general of the Pell Los Empire, who overcame death, and sets out to reveal the incidents that led to his downfall and seek vengeance on his enemies.

name: Blue Prince
description: Welcome to Mt. Holly, where every dawn unveils a new mystery. Navigate through shifting corridors and ever-changing chambers in this genre-defying strategy puzzle adventure. But will your unpredictable path lead you to the rumored Room 46?

name: Only Up
description: Embark on an exciting journey in Only UP ! Play as Jacky, a teenager from the ghetto who wants to get out of poverty and join the wealth of the Space ! As you explore a huge world full of secrets and mysteries, you will have to climb as high as possible !

name: Schedule 1
description: From small-time dope pusher to kingpin - manufacture and distribute a range of drugs throughout the grungy city of Hyland Point. Expand your empire with properties, businesses, employees and more.

name: RuneScape: Dragonwilds
description: On RuneScape’s forgotten continent of Ashenfall, dragons have awoken. Gather, build, skill and craft to survive in this co-operative (1-4) survival crafting game. Only by mastering survival and uncovering ancient secrets can they hope to slay the Dragon Queen—alone or with allies.

name: Cities: Skylines 2
description: Raise a city from the ground up and transform it into a thriving metropolis with the most realistic city builder ever. Push your creativity and problem-solving to build on a scale you've never experienced. With deep simulation and a living economy, this is world-building without limits.

name: Crashlands 2
description: Slap your way across a vibrant world where interstellar friendships are the key to your survival. Befriend eccentric aliens, craft bizarre weaponry, and stick it to the man in this sequel to the award-winning open world crafting RPG Crashlands.

name: Mandragora: Whispers of the Witch Tree
description: Slay your way in Mandragora: Whispers of the Witch Tree, an epic action RPG in a dark fantasy world. Battle monsters, master six unique Classes, craft hundreds of useful items, and explore the secrets of an expansive, interconnected world.

name: Frostpunk 2
description: Develop, expand, and advance your city in a society survival game set 30 years after an apocalyptic blizzard ravaged Earth. In Frostpunk 2, you face not only the perils of never-ending winter, but also the powerful factions that watch your every step inside the Council Hall.

name: Manor Lords
description: Manor Lords is a medieval strategy game featuring in-depth city building, large-scale tactical battles, and complex economic and social simulations. Rule your lands as a medieval lord – the seasons pass, the weather changes, and cities rise and fall.

name: inZOI
description: "Every life becomes a story" Create your unique story by controlling and observing the lives of 'Zois'. Customize characters and build houses using inZOI's easy-to-use tools to live the life of your dreams and experience the different emotions of life created by its deep and detailed simulation.

name: AI LIMIT
description: In the distant future when civilization is on the verge of extinction, people follow the legend of the Elysium in the last city, Havenswell. In this post-apocalyptic wasteland sci-fi ARPG, you will play as Arrisa, a Blader with immortality, and explore the city ruin to find the hope of a new life.

name: Horizon Zero Dawn
description: Experience the critically acclaimed Horizon Zero Dawn™ with stunning new visuals and upgraded features. In a far future where colossal machines roam the Earth, pockets of humanity survive in unique tribes among the lush, overgrown ruins of our long-lost civilization.

name: Dead Space™ 3
description: Journey across space to the icy planet of Tau Volantis with Isaac Clarke and Sgt. John Carver to discover and destroy the source of the Necromorph outbreak.

name: Deathloop
description: DEATHLOOP is a next-gen FPS from Arkane Lyon, the award-winning studio behind Dishonored. In DEATHLOOP, two rival assassins are trapped in a mysterious timeloop on the island of Blackreef, doomed to repeat the same day for eternity.

name: Football Manager 2023
description: Take the helm of your club in Football Manager 2023 and immerse yourself in its unparalleled depth and meticulous detail. Become the ultimate mastermind—craft your own headlines, win the hearts of fans, and dominate the beautiful game. Your legacy starts here.

name: Dead Space 2
description: Three years after the Necromorph infestation aboard the USS Ishimura, Isaac Clarke awakens from a coma, confused, disoriented, and on a space station called The Sprawl. Explore this world and its zero-g environments to discover the truth about the Unitology and its role in the Necromorph epidemic.

name: Inside the Backrooms
description: Inside the Backrooms is a horror multiplayer game mixed with different mechanics that will make you spend an intense night with friends. Explore, think, interact, but be careful, it is rumored that there are several entities wishing to find you...

name: Platform 8
description: You are trapped on a train that runs forever. Keep an eye out for anomalies and find a way out.

name: Five Hearts Under One Roof
description: [Five Hearts Under One Roof] is a fully immersive interactive video game that simulates a love story with five unique heroines. As the player, you take on the role of Yuman, who has always been home alone. Now, you’ll be running a lively, love-filled boarding house with five fascinating heroines.

name: The Callisto Protocol
description: In this narrative-driven, third-person survival horror game set 300 years in the future, the player will take on the role of Jacob Lee – a victim of fate thrown into Black Iron Prison, a maximum-security penitentiary located on Jupiter's moon, Callisto. When inmates begin to transform into monstrous creatures, the prison is thrown into chaos. To survive, Jacob must battle his way to safety to escape Black Iron Prison, while uncovering the dark and disturbing secrets buried beneath the surface of Callisto.

name: ARK: Survival Ascended
description: You awaken on a mysterious island, where blinding sunlight and dazzling colors overwhelm your senses. Azure waves lap against your bare feet. A guttural roar pierces through the mist-laden jungle—jolting you upright. Not out of fear... but burning curiosity.

name: Poppy Playtime: Chapter 4
description: You are pushed deeper into the undiscovered depths of the Playtime Co. factory, far below anything the world knew. Here, you’ll encounter terrifying new threats and discover shocking revelations. Can you outwit the unnatural new creations lurking in the shadows? Can you survive here long enough to eventually unravel the mysteries behind the experiments? Every step will test your courage, every puzzle will challenge your mind, and every corner may be your last.

name: Raft
description: By yourself or with friends, your mission is to survive an epic oceanic adventure across a perilous sea! Gather debris to survive, expand your raft and set sail towards forgotten and dangerous islands!

name: Mafia III: Definitive Edition
description: After years in Vietnam (1968), Lincoln Clay learned a hard truth: Family ain't who you're born with—it's who you're willing to die for. Returning to New Bordeaux, he tries leaving his criminal past behind—until the Italian mob betrays and massacres his surrogate family, the Black Mob. From the ashes, Lincoln forges a new family, exacting brutal vengeance on every connected mobster.

name: Mafia II: Definitive Edition
description: 《Mafia II: Definitive Edition》 unfolds in 1940s-50s Empire Bay, New York. War hero Vito Scaletta turns to the mob to settle his father's debts. With his buddy Joe Barbaro, Vito climbs the criminal ladder — pulling off bigger jobs for fatter payouts and deadlier consequences, cementing his place in the family.

name: TCG Card Shop
description: Open your own local game store. Stock shelves with the latest booster packs, or crack them and collect the cards for yourself. Set your own prices, hire staff, host events, and expand your card shop.

name: Uncharted 4
description: Compared to its predecessors, Uncharted 4 will undergo some stylistic changes. This installment will be one of the darker entries in the series and will place greater emphasis on storytelling. The game's story takes place three years after Uncharted 3: Drake's Deception and is set in a Madagascar colony. The settings range from East African countries along the Indian Ocean to various snow-covered outdoor locations. The two brothers will face off against the antagonist treasure hunters Rafe and Nadine. In addition to guarding against the cunning and deceit of enemies, Drake must also constantly be wary of Sam's reckless actions.

name: Undertale
description: UNDERTALE! The RPG game where you don't have to destroy anyone.

name: Yandere Simulator
description: Yandere Simulator is a stealth game about stalking a boy and secretly eliminating any girl who has a crush on him, while maintaining the image of an innocent schoolgirl.

name: Amanda the Adventurer
description: Join Amanda and her pal Wooly on a series of adventures as they explore and learn about our wonderful world! With several NEW play-along, laugh-along, learn-along episodes there's always fun to be had! Just make sure to do everything Amanda says or she might get angry.

name: Poppy Playtime: Chapter 2
description: Après avoir affronté Huggy Wuggy et libéré Poppy, vous devez vous enfoncer au cœur de la fabrique de jouets Playtime Co., dans laquelle des puzzles complexes et des jouets terrifiants vous attendent. Agrippez-vous, balancez-vous et tentez de vous échapper, mais ne vous faites pas attraper par Mommy.Poursuivez votre exploration des entrailles de Playtime Co. à la recherche de réponses. Votre voyage pour découvrir ce qui s'est passé dans l'usine ne fait que commencer…• Faites équipe avec Poppy pour vous échapper en lieu sûr.• Explorez une nouvelle zone immense : la Station de Jeu.• Tâchez de ne pas vous faire remarquer. Il ne faudrait pas que Mommy Long Legs vous attrape…• Découvrez de nouveaux mini-jeux, mais prenez garde ! L'échec peut être mortel.• De nouveaux jouets comme Bunzo Bunny et PJ Pug-a-Pillar sont impatients de vous rencontrer !• Franchissez de nombreux obstacles avec les nouvelles capacités du GrabPack.Votre ticket pour la liberté vous attend chez Playtime Co.…

name: Poppy Playtime: Chapter 1
description: You must stay alive in this horror/puzzle adventure. Try to survive the vengeful toys waiting for you in the abandoned toy factory. Use your GrabPack to hack electrical circuits or nab items from afar. Explore the mysterious facility… and don’t get caught.Welcome to Playtime Co.!Playtime Co. was once the king of the toy manufacturing industry... until everybody inside of the factory one day disappeared into thin air. Now, years later, you must explore the factory and uncover the truth.

name: MiSide
description: Every day, you come to see me, help me with chores, cook for me, and even buy me little gifts.You're so kind! I really like you!I wish I could keep you by my side every day and live together with you~I know you also want to be with me every day, so I've already brought you to our cozy little home~How about it? Aren't you happy? This way, we can be together every moment!

name: God of War: Ragnarök
description: Kratos and Atreus embark on a mythic journey for answers before Ragnarök arrives – now on PC.This game may take up some time to load, please be patient and wait.【Force Quit】Back +  RB 【Control】interact：B     avoid：A                      axe：Y    action：X                    hard attack：RT   aim：LT                    attack：RB   block：LB

name: Poppy Playtime: Chapter 3
description: Players can complete various challenges here, face numerous opponents and receive different rewards, making you become more levels. Searching for mission props is very important, which can bring a lot of different fun and experience a more enjoyable game process.

name: SCUM
description: Traverse punishing environments, looting, crafting and evading the constant threats to your life. The unprecedented levels of character customization and progression are your ultimate tools for survival.

name: Buckshot Roulette
description: Play Russian roulette with a 12-gauge shotgun. Four enter. One leaves. Roll the dice with your life. Good luck!

name: Supermarket Simulator
description: Run your own supermarket! Stock shelves, set your prices, take payments, hire staff, expand your store, handle shoplifters, and design your layout. Purchase goods from online or local markets around town, and personally deliver online orders to your customers.

name: The Long Drive
description: Random generated open world semi-post apocalyptic survival car driving game.

name: GigaBash
description: Control giant monsters and heroes with family and friends to battle to the fullest. In scenes with unique features from all over the world, they compete with each other and become the only king on the field.

name: Zoonomaly
description: You must survive a monster infested zoo while searching for key shards that unlock the truth to its origin. Collect all the key shards by solving puzzles throughout the grounds and put a stop to the monster mayhem.

name: Hades II
description: Battle beyond the Underworld using dark sorcery to take on the Titan of Time in this bewitching sequel to the award-winning rogue-like dungeon crawler.

name: Brotato
description: Brotato is a top-down arena shooting light ROGUE game where players will take on the role of a potato who simultaneously uses six weapons to repel swarms of aliens. Choose from various features and props, create unique buildings and survive until rescue arrives.

name: Wobbly Life
description: Wobbly Life is a vibrant open-world physics sandbox. Play with your friends online or in local co-op, with exciting jobs, mini games and wacky story missions. Earn cash to spend in the world on clothes, vehicles and houses. There is a whole Wobbly World out there to explore!

name: Sniper：Ghost Warrior Contracts2
description: 【Introduction】SGW Contracts 2 is a modern warfare shooter set in the Middle East. Play as Raven, Contract Sniper Assassin, as you take out a series of targets across a dramatic single-player campaign. With extreme-range shots exceeding 1000m, gear up for the most challenging entry to the series yet.【Force Quit】 Back + RB (Right Back Button on the controller)

name: Halo: The Master Chief Collection
description: 【Introduction】: The classic heroic journey of the Master Chief spans across 6 games, now unified into one. Whether you are a long-time fan or meeting Spartan 117 for the first time, “Halo: The Master Chief Collection” will definitely satisfy you, offering the best Halo experience.【Force Quit】: Back + RB (Right upper rear button on the controller)

name: Alan Wake 2
description: Can Saga Anderson and Alan Wake escape this terrifying predicament and become heroes?【Force Quit】: Back + RB (Right Bumper on the controller)

name: Neon Abyss
description: Neon Abyss is a horizontal dungeon game that emphasizes the stacking effect of props. Shooting, treasure hunting, death? Suicide! Who is the boss on earth? (Roguelike that can even be played with hands!) Rich prop effects stack up, providing a constantly new combat experience. Excellent art style with numerous characters to choose from.

name: Stick Fight: The Game
description: In the game, players will control a comical stickman and engage in chaos in various irregular fields, using various weapons falling from the sky to counterattack, making themselves the stickman standing at the end.

name: Ratchet & Clank
description: 【Button】：Spirit：B     Jump：A   Select Weapons：Y    Combat：X                     Shoot：RT   Aim：LT     String：LB     Boots：RB

name: The Last of Us™ Part I
description: In a ravaged civilization, where infected and hardened survivors run rampant, Joel, a weary protagonist, is hired to smuggle 14-year-old Ellie out of a military quarantine zone. However, what starts as a small job soon transforms into a brutal cross-country journey.

name: Builder Simulator
description: [Introduction]: The House Building Simulator game is designed and developed for those whose greatest dream has always been to start from scratch and build their own house. You can plan your design, purchase all the necessary materials, and then build a beautiful home brick by brick. Is this task easy to accomplish?[Force Quit]: Back + RB (Right Back Button on the controller)[Controls]:Interact/Attack: BJump: ATools: YHint: XLay down: RTLast action/Open tools: LB

name: Minecraft: Legends
description: Discover the mysteries of Minecraft Legends, a new action strategy game. Explore a gentle land of rich resources and lush biomes on the brink of destruction. The ravaging piglins have arrived, and it’s up to you to inspire your allies and lead them in strategic battles to save the Overworld!【Force Quit】：Back +  RB Please choose offline mode【Control】：Cloatse Comb：B     Jump/Fly：A    command：Y    Entice/Stop enticng：X                     Build：RT   Blueprint：LT     Switch Shortcut：LB/RB

name: Need for Speed: Payback
description: 【Introduction】: Set in the underworld of Fortune Valley, you and your crew were divided by betrayal and reunited by revenge to take down The House, a nefarious cartel that rules the city’s casinos, criminals and cops. In this corrupt gambler’s paradise, the stakes are high and The House always wins.【Force Quit】: Back + RB (Right Rear Upper Button on the Controller)【Buttons】: Downshift: B     Nitro: A     Upshift: Y    Handbrake: X                     Accelerate: RT   Brake: LT     Horn: LB     Action: RB

name: SpongeBob SquarePants: Battle for Bikini Bottom
description: 【Introduction】: Are you ready, kids? The cult classic is back, faithfully remade in spongetastic splendor! Play as SpongeBob, Patrick and Sandy and show the evil Plankton that crime pays even less than Mr. Krabs.【Force Quit】: Back + RB (Right Bumper on the controller)【Controls】: Bounce/Bowling: B     Jump: A    Bubble Bash: Y    Attack: X                      Show HUD: RT  Sneak: LT     Cruise Bubble: LB     Interact: RB

name: Super Bunny Man
description: A physics-based co-op platformer about a guy in a rabbit costume! Team up with a friend or three (local or online) to beat levels, find hidden carrots and race against the clock. Experience bunny madness. Embrace carrot chaos. Become Super Bunny Man.

name: Hogwarts Legacy
description: 【Loading】: The magical world requires some loading time. Please be patient, wizards.【Create】: When creating a character, long press the start button to bring up the virtual keyboard and enter your name.【Introduction】: Experience Hogwarts in the 1800s. You will play as a student holding the key to an ancient secret that could threaten the entire magical world. Make allies, fight dark wizards, and ultimately decide the fate of the magical world. Write your own legend. Leave a legacy for future generations.【Force Quit】: Back + RB (Right Rear Upper Button on the controller)【Controls】: Dodge: B     Jump: A    Shield: Y    Interact: X                     Basic Magic: RT   Aim: LT     Tool Wheel/Use Item: LB     Ancient Magic Throw: RB

name: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Cosmic Shake
description: Wish-granting Mermaid’s Tears in the hands of SpongeBob and Patrick… What could go wrong? Sure, the very fabric holding the universe together could come undone, opening portals into wild Wishworlds. But that’s nothing our favorite sponge can’t handle- with the right cosmic costume!【Buttton】：Dodge/Attack：B     Jump/Slide：A    Interact：Y    Spin Attack：X   Swain Hook：RT   Attack on Ground：LT  Switch HUD：LB     Bumble：RB

name: Drift Racing Online
description: 【Introduction】: CarX Drift Racing Online is your chance to immerse yourself in the real world of drifting. Get together with friends, tune your car and burn some tires!【Force Quit】: Back + RB (Right Rear Upper Button on the Controller)【Buttons】: Restore Vehicle: B     Handbrake: A    Next Camera: Y    Clutch: X                     Throttle: RT   Brake: LT     Previous Gear: LB     Next Gear: RB

name: Choo-Choo Charles
description: Prompt: Press the START button to activate the controller after entering the game.Description: Drive a vintage train around an open-world island, continuously upgrading and modifying it as you progress, while using it to fight against the evil spider train Charles.Force Quit: Back + RB (Right Bumper on the controller)Controls:Exit/Return: B Jump: A、Inventory/Zoom Out Map: Y、Zoom In Map/Skip Tutorial Dialogue: X、Interact/Action/Place Marker: RT、Open Map: LT Tilt Left: LB、Tilt Right: RB

name: NBA 2K23
description: The NBA 2K23 has put the entire basketball world in your hands. Start a "fast game" and engage in battles with real teams and players in a realistic NBA and WNBA environment.

name: Ranch Simulator22
description: The map is large, and creation takes time, please be patient.[Introduction]: Create your farm and grow beautiful moments! Harvest crops, care for animals, manage production, and face seasonal challenges head-on.[Force Quit]: Back + RB (Right Back Button on the controller)[Controls]:Plant: BJump: ALoad/Unload: YMachine interaction: XAccelerate: RTReverse: LTTransform: LBActivate farm tools: RB

name: Marvel’s Spider-Man Remastered
description: In Marvel’s Spider-Man Remastered, the worlds of Peter Parker and Spider-Man collide in an original action-packed story. Play as an experienced Peter Parker, fighting big crime and iconic villains in Marvel’s New York. Web-swing through vibrant neighborhoods and defeat villains with epic

name: Stray
description: 《Stray》 is a third-person adventure game where you play as a stray cat navigating a decaying cybercity. Explore meticulously detailed neon-lit alleys and grungy underbellies, leaping across high and low terrain. Survive unforeseen threats in this indifferent world inhabited solely by mundane robots and dangerous creatures, while unraveling the mysteries of this forgotten realm.

name: Subnautica Zero
description: The story of Subnautica: Below Zero takes place on an alien planet, where icy storms endlessly churn the planet's surface. Given this harsh environment, diving into the sea, where temperatures are more controllable, is safer than staying on land. You can search for resources in the ocean, build an underwater home, and begin exploring the depths.

name: GhostWire: Tokyo
description: 【Loading】The game requires some startup time, please be patient.                     No charges will be incurred during this period.【Introduction】: Explore a Tokyo twisted by supernatural forces. From ultra-modern cityscapes to dark,                         deep alleys and ancient, elegant temples, traverse through unique aesthetics and                         discover the monsters rampant in the city—the vengeful spirits wandering the streets.【Force Quit】: Back + RB (Right Rear Upper Button on the controller)【Controls】: Crouch/Stand: B     Jump/Ethereal Glide/Ethereal Leap: A    Food Switch/Use: Y                     Spirit Vision: X      Ranged Attack: RT   Aim/Purify/Absorb: LT    Block: LB                 Ethereal Combat Skill Attribute Switch: RB    Melee Attack: RS

name: THE KING OF FIGHTERS XV
description: SHATTER ALL EXPECTATIONS! Transcend beyond your limits with KOF XV!

name: Nintendo Star Brawl
description: 【Loading】: The game requires some startup time, please be patient.                     No charges will be incurred during this period.【Introduction】: The game features 103 stages. Each map can accommodate up to eight players in a brawl and can be set to "Battlefield," "Final Destination," or "Big Battlefield" modes, effectively giving over 300 maps. Additionally, players can set up dual-stage switching during battles, resulting in 300² possible combinations.【Force Quit】: Back + RB (Right Bumper on the controller)【Controls】: Long press the Start button to bring up the control diagram

name: Elden Ring
description: 【Note】: When creating a character, long press START to enter the settings menu - Control Settings - Enable Virtual Keyboard Input to input text.【Introduction】: Step into vast scenes and explore unknown underground labyrinths. Challenge perilous situations filled with difficulties and enjoy the sense of accomplishment when overcoming them.【Force Quit】: Back + RB (Right Bumper on the controller)【Controls】: Roll, Dash, Backstep: B     Jump: A    Trigger Event: Y    Use Item: X                     Heavy Attack: RT    Skill: LT    Light Attack: RB    Guard: LB    Crouch: LS

name: LEGO The Incredibles
description: [Force Quit] Back + RB (right bumper on the controller)[Controls]Special: BJump: ASwitch Character: YAction: XSwitch Down: LBSwitch Up: RB

name: Watch Dogs: Legion
description: [Note] After entering, choose "Story Mode."[Loading] The game takes a while to load, please be patient.Overview: In the game, your task is to build a resistance to fight against a tyrannical regime. You can recruit and play as anyone, each with their unique gameplay traits. Your choices have significant consequences, and if the character you play gets into too much trouble, they might permanently die.Quick Exit: Back + RB (Right Bumper on the controller)Controls:Cancel Throw/Cover: BParkour: AInteract/Grab/Reload: YAttack/Take Down: XAim and Shoot/Sprint: RTAim: LTUse/Recall Gadget: RBHack: LB

name: God of War 4
description: The days of Kratos' vengeance upon the Olympian gods are long past. Now, he lives as a mortal in lands stalked by Norse deities and monsters alike. In this frozen, desolate wilderness... survival is forged only through battle.

name: Cooking Simulator
description: [Introduction]: Become the ultimate chef! Take control in a fully-equipped, beautifully decorated realistic kitchen! Unlock and master over 80 recipes, use dozens of real ingredients, and cook up perfect dishes. The entire process features realistic physics effects![Force Quit]: Back + RB (Right Back Button on the controller)[Controls]:Return: BConfirm: AThrow: YSpecial action: XCrouch: RTAdvanced item operation: LTSwitch smartphone: BACK[Note]: The game startup time is a bit long, please be patient.[Reminder]: No charges during loading.

name: FIFA19
description: [Match]: Other players can join during the selection screen at the start of the match.[Note]: If prompted that you are not logged in, select to use the default lineup.Overview: In the game, both Career Mode and Ultimate Team allow you to play in the Champions League. The Ultimate Team mode from the previous installment returns, allowing players to build their dream team.Quick Exit: Back + RB (Right Bumper on the controller)Controls:Lofted Pass/Cross/Header: X Through Ball: YGround Pass/Header: A Shoot/Volley/Header: B

name: Grand Theft Auto: Vice City
description: Welcome to the 1980s. From the decade of big hair and pastel suits comes the story of one man's rise to the top of the criminal pile. Grand Theft Auto returns with Tommy Vercetti’s tale of betrayal and revenge in a neon-soaked tropical town full of excess and brimming with possibilities.

name: Grand Theft Auto: San Andreas
description: Grand Theft Auto: San Andreas: It’s the early ’90s. After a couple of cops frame him for homicide, Carl ‘CJ’ Johnson is forced on a journey that takes him across the entire state of San Andreas, to save his family and to take control of the streets.

name: Grand Theft Auto III
description: It all starts in Liberty City. With revolutionary freedom to go anywhere and jack anyone, Grand Theft Auto III puts the center of the criminal underworld at your fingertips, if you have enough guts to take it.

name: The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild
description: In ancient times, ancestors created four giant Divine Beasts, which resemble animals and can be controlled by humans, and Guardians, which are autonomous sentinels that battle enemies. The royal princess, who possesses the power of sealing, and the knight chosen by the sword that seals the darkness, once sealed Ganon in the distant ancient era along with the Divine Beasts and Guardians.

name: ARK: Survival Evolved
description: Stranded on the shores of a mysterious island, you must learn to survive. Use your cunning to kill or tame the primeval creatures roaming the land, and encounter other players to survive, dominate... and escape!【Quick Exit】 Back + RB (Right Bumper on the controller)【Controls】Inventory: B                     Jump: A Use: Y                Reload/Activate: X             Primary Weapon: RT                Secondary Weapon: LT      Action Select: LB                Melee: RB

name: Cities: Skylines
description: Have Fun

name: Arma 3
description: Experience true combat gameplay in a vast military sandbox. This is the best PC military game, featuring a variety of content, over 20 vehicles, and more than 40 weapons, along with limitless content creation opportunities. Realistic, diverse, and open—Arma 3 sends you into battle.

name: Assassin's Creed: Brotherhood
description: Overview: Ezio, now a legendary Master Assassin, continues to survive against the powerful Templar Order. He must now journey to Rome, the center of power, greed, and corruption, to strike at the heart of the enemy. To defeat the deeply entrenched tyrants in Rome, Ezio requires not only strength but also outstanding leadership. Thus, he commands the Brotherhood, united under his leadership, to fight alongside him.Quick Exit: Back + RB (Right Bumper on the controller)Controls:- Hand-to-Hand: B- Foot: A- Head: Y- Armed: X- Sprint: RT- Super Lock Target: LT- Assassination: LB- Weapon Wheel: RB

name: Assassin's Creed: Revelations
description: "Assassin's Creed: Revelations" follows the legendary protagonist Ezio as he traces the steps of his predecessor, Altair. Embark on a journey to uncover the truth, delivering the most immersive gameplay experience to date and the pinnacle of the Ezio Trilogy.

name: Assassin's Creed: Black Flag
description: Overview: The game narrates Edward's journey from participating in the waning years of the 18th-century privateering war to becoming involved in the Assassin Brotherhood's age-old conflict with the Templars. The game features historical pirate legends such as Blackbeard and Charles Vane, leading players through the exploration of numerous islands and vast seas of the West Indies, recreating the golden age of piracy.Quick Exit: Back + RB (Right Bumper on the controller)Controls:- Interact/Counter: B- Fast Walk/Jump/Break Defense: A- Tools: Y- Assassinate/Melee Weapons: X- Run: RT- Free Aim: LT- Reload: LB- Island Info: RB

name: Assassin's Creed: Syndicate
description: In this game, Assassin Jacob Frye, with the help of his twin sister Evie, changes the fate of many in Assassin's Creed: Syndicate. Stand up, unite, and lead the people of the underground world to break the chains of corruption and darkness that loom over London in a thrilling adventure filled with violence, intrigue, and brutal combat!

name: Football：PES 2021
description: 【Online】: For match selection, choose "Kick-off" - "Co-op" / "VERSUS", then pick a side.【Note】: If prompted, choose to continue offline.【Overview】: Added many new elements beyond the gaming experience.                     In addition to the latest season's player and club data, the game also includes an exclusive                     UEFA EURO 2020 mode, as well as content from the real-world events that have been rescheduled.【Forced Quit】: Back + RB (upper right button on the controller)【Controls】: Air pass/Sliding tackle: B     Ground pass/Pressure: A    Direct pass/Goalkeeper: Y                     Shoot: X    Special control: RT   Manual control: LT      Change cursor: LB      Sprint: RB

name: Mount & Blade II: Bannerlord
description: Horns blared to the heavens, and flocks of crows darkened the sky. The Calradic Empire has been torn into three parts due to internal strife. New kingdoms are quietly rising. Don your longsword, tighten your armor, recruit soldiers, and gallop across the battlefields of Calradia to win glory. Sweep away the ashes of the old world, create a new world of your own, establish a new hegemony that dominates the land, and become the overlord of Calradia!

name: Fling to Finish
description: Online: Other players can join by dragging to select a team and then confirming.Introduction: In Ultimate Pulling, two players are tied to the ends of a stretchable elastic rope, teaming up to race through vibrant and chaotic obstacle courses. When you and your friend first start the game, the rope might get tangled up wherever you go.Force Quit: Back + RB (Right Bumper on the controller)Buttons:1P Jump: LB1P Move: Left Stick1P Pull Teammate: Up1P Stick: LT2P Jump: RB2P Move: Right Stick2P Pull Teammate: A2P Stick: RT

name: A Way Out
description: Note: Only supports two-player gameplayOnline: Choose different characters in-gameIntroduction: Each player needs to control one of the two protagonists, Leo and Vincent. Despite their reluctance, they must work together to escape and regain their freedom.Force Quit: Back + RB (Right Bumper on the controller)Buttons:Cancel: BJump: ATalk: YInteract: XFocus/Aim: LTPause/Shoot: RT

name: Slime Rancher
description: Introduction: This young and adventurous rancher begins her new life as a slime rancher on the "Far, Far Range," 1000 light years away from Earth. With the spirit of perseverance and a trusty vacuum gun, she embarks on a new journey. Here, she will rebuild the ranch, accumulate wealth, and navigate the many adventures hidden behind the squishy slimes.Force Quit: Back + RB (Right Bumper on the controller)Buttons:Pulse: BJump: AFlashlight: YInteract: XShoot: RTVacuum: LTPrevious Slot: LBNext Slot: RB

name: Alba: A Wildlife Adventure
description: Introduction: Even the smallest person can make a big difference. Join Alba, as she sets out to save her beautiful island and its wildlife. And possibly start a revolution.Force Quit: Back + RB (Right Bumper on the controller)Buttons:Close: BInteract/Confirm: AHome: XTake Photo/Next Category: RTPrevious Category: LTTask List: D-Pad UpGuide: D-Pad Left

name: Days Gone
description: Ride and fight into a deadly, post pandemic America. Play as Deacon St. John, a drifter and bounty hunter who rides the broken road, fighting to survive while searching for a reason to live in this open-world action-adventure game.【Button】：Slide：B    Climb/Change Shoulders：A    Switch Weapons/Special：Y    Reload：X                     Survive loop：LT   Roll：RT    Shooot/Fight：RB  Aim：LB

name: Assassin’s Creed Odyssey: The Fate of Atlantis
description: 【Loading】The game is large and may take some time to start. Please be patient.【Overview】 Embark on an adventure into the legendary realms of Greek mythology, discover the true power of your hero, and uncover the secrets of the First Civilization. Explore three new worlds inspired by Greek mythology—Elysium, the Underworld, and Atlantis!【Force Quit】Back + RB (Right bumper on the controller)【Controls】Crouch/Climb Down: BParkour Action: AMain Interaction/Assassinate: YDodge: XHeavy Attack/Shoot Arrow/Drop: RTZoom: LTThrow Grenade: LBLight Attack/Cancel Ability Shot: RB

name: Euro Truck Simulator 2
description: Travel across Europe like a king of the road, delivering valuable cargo to distant destinations! Journey through numerous cities in the UK, Belgium, Germany, Italy, the Netherlands, Poland, and more; your endurance, skill, and speed are pushed to their limits!

name: Forza Horizon 4
description: 【Loading】: The game is large and requires some loading time, please be patient.【Note】: No charges during startup.【Description】: In the world's greatest automotive festival, ever-changing seasons change everything.Explore beautiful and historic Britain in an open world. Collect, modify, and drive over 450 cars. Race, stunt, create, and explore to your heart's content.【Force Quit】: Back + RB (Right bumper on the controller)【Controls】: Handbrake: A    Rewind: Y    Start: X      Change View: RB     View Events: LB                    Accelerate: RT   Brake: LT      Start ANNA: Up     Horn: RS     Map: BACK

name: Tokyo 2020 Olympics
description: Versus Mode: Select "Two Player Mode" to playIntroduction: The Olympic Games are back, and this is your great chance to win glory! Play with friends and family, or compete for gold and silver on global leaderboards... This party game is suitable for all ages. Join the game now!Force Quit: Back + RB (Right Bumper on the controller)Buttons: Different events have different controls, see in-game event instructions for details.

name: SUPERHOT: Mind Control Delete
description: The long-awaited third game in the groundbreaking SUPERHOT franchise - MIND CONTROL DELETE gives you more insight into the world of SUPERHOT, more story, more signature gameplay. Keep dancing the slow-motion ballet of destruction for so much longer than ever before.

name: My Friend Pedro
description: Description:My Friend Pedro is a blood-soaked ballet about friendship and imagination, where a man embarks on a relentless killing spree under the guidance of a talking banana. This unexpected, over-the-top adventure combines stylish action sequences with a unique, darkly humorous narrative.ControlsForce Quit: Back + RB (Right Bumper)Buttons:Interact: B Jump: AKick: Y Reload: XFire: RT (Right Trigger)Secondary Fire Mode: LT (Left Trigger)Motorcycle Rear Wheel Balance: LB (Left Bumper)

name: Doom Eternal
description: Hell’s armies have invaded Earth. Become the Slayer in an epic single-player campaign to conquer demons across dimensions and stop the final destruction of humanity. The only thing they fear... is you.

name: Party Hard2
description: Description:In Party Hard 2, use hundreds of methods to eliminate those annoying party-goers, accidentally dismantle a drug cartel, and protect Earth from an alien invasion. May the Chicken God be with you!ControlsForce Quit: Back + RB (Right Bumper)Buttons:Pick Up: B Use Object: ADance: Y Use Item: XUltimate: RT (Right Trigger)Sprint: LT (Left Trigger)Quick Map: LB (Left Bumper)Quick Use: RB (Right Bumper)

name: The Amazing Spider-Man 2
description: Force Quit: Back + RB (right bumper on the controller)Controls: Web Shot / Blast: B      Jump / Air Dash: AParry / Dodge: Y                        Attack: XRight Web Swing: RT                  Left Web Swing: LTWeb Pull: LB                      Web Boost (Hold) / Quick Boost (Tap): RB

name: Transformers: Devastation
description: 【Force Quit】：Back +  RB 【Button】：Jump：A    Hard Attack：Y    Light Attack：X    Shoot：RT     Transform：RB                 Aim：LT     Skills：LB

name: Control
description: 【Introduction】 A form of corruption has invaded the Federal Bureau of Control… Only you have the power to stop it.With containment failing, humanity faces a life-or-death crisis. Can you regain control?【Force Quit]】Back + RB (Right Bumper on the controller)【Controls】Dodge: B                            Jump/Levitate: AMelee: Y                            Use/Grab/Switch Weapon: XShoot: RT                             Aim: LTShield: LB                           Throw/Drop: RB

name: Halo: Reach
description: After entering, select Reach to start the game. In the game, players will once again experience the strength and noble spirit of the Spartan warriors.

name: The Amazing Spider-Man
description: 【Introduction】Players will swing through a 3D representation of New York City, using Spider-Man’s extraordinary powers to save humanity and uncover the city’s secrets.【Force Quit】 Back + RB (right shoulder button on the controller)【Controls】Shoot Web/Blast: B          Jump/Air Dash: ACounter/Dodge: Y            Attack: XWeb Swing: RT                Web Pull: LBWeb Dash (hold)/Quick Dash (tap): RB

name: Fallout 4
description: Fallout 4 is the fourth installment in the role-playing game series Fallout, developed by Bethesda. The development team is the same group behind The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim. In the new game, players will encounter new items, character designs, and gameplay mechanics.

name: It Takes Two
description: 【Local Offline】: Please select "Offline Play"【Adjust Volume】: In-game, hold Start   LB: Volume-  RB: Volume+【Skip Cutscenes】: Both players hold the "B" button simultaneously to quickly skip cutscenes【Note】: No charges during loading【Force Quit】: Back + RB (Right bumper on the controller)【Controls】: Dash: X     Interact: Y    Rope Hook: RB    Jump: A    Cancel: B                    Chapter Ability: RT/LT     Sprint: LS

name: Minecraft:Dungeons
description: Fight your way through an exciting action-adventure game, inspired by classic dungeon crawlers and set in the Minecraft universe!

name: Call of Duty: WWII
description: The campaign storyline of this game returns to the battlefields of World War II. Starting from the D-Day landings in Normandy, it spans classic battles across various iconic locations in Europe. In the game, players will experience the classic combat of Call of Duty and the camaraderie among soldiers.

name: Little Nightmares II
description: Retournez dans un monde horriblement charmant avec Little Nightmares II, un jeu d'aventure et de suspense dans lequel vous jouez le rôle de Mono, un jeune garçon prisonnier d'un monde déformé par les émissions bourdonnantes d'une tour lointaine.Accompagné de son guide Six, la fille à l'imperméable jaune, Mono cherchera à découvrir les sombres secrets de la tour de l’émetteur. Leur aventure ne sera pas facile : Mono et Six devront faire face aux nouvelles menaces des terribles résidents de ce monde.Oserez-vous affronter cette collection de nouveaux petits cauchemars?

name: Hand of Fate 2
description: Hand of Fate 2 is a dungeon-crawling game set in a dark fantasy world. Every step of the adventure is determined by the events the player draws from a deck of legendary event cards. You must make wise choices, as your opponent—the mysterious dealer—will leave you no room for error. He is determined to shape you into a tool of vengeance.

name: The Past Room
description: The Past Room is a hand-drawn point-and-click puzzle game. It tells a unique and emotionally resonant story. Players need to solve puzzles hidden within everyday trivialities to uncover past secrets. Embark on a wonderful imaginative journey through a series of life-like hand-drawn scenes.

name: Little Nightmares
description: Plongez dans le conte sombre et singulier de Little Nightmares et affrontez les terreurs de votre enfance ! Aidez Six à s'échapper de l'Antre, un vaste et mystérieux vaisseau peuplé d'âmes corrompues en quête de leur prochain repas... Au cours de votre périple, vous découvrirez la plus troublante des maisons de poupée : à la fois prison dont l'on rêve de s'évader et vaste terrain de jeu que l'on prend plaisir à explorer. Il vous faudra retrouver l'enfant qui sommeille en vous pour laisser libre cours à votre imagination et trouver le moyen de sortir !

name: Grand Theft Auto V
description: Experience entertainment blockbusters Grand Theft Auto V and Grand Theft Auto Online — now upgraded for a new generation with stunning visuals, faster loading, 3D audio, and more, plus exclusive content for GTA Online players.

name: Mafia: Definitive Edition
description: "Mafia: Definitive Edition" begins its saga in 1930s Lost Heaven, Illinois.This meticulously remade classic immerses players in Prohibition-era America, where you'll rise through the ranks of organized crime. After an accidental clash with gangsters, cab driver Tommy Angelo is thrust into the mob world. Though initially conflicted about joining the Salieri crime family, the lucrative rewards prove too tempting to resist.

name: ONE PIECE: PIRATE WARRIORS 4
description: This work takes "realistic ONE PIECE experience" as the core concept, incorporating the effects of building destruction and smoke and dust in action scenes, striving to recreate the "ONE PIECE battlefield".

name: Overcooked 2
description: Overcooked returns with a brand-new helping of chaotic cooking action! Journey back to the Onion Kingdom and assemble your team of chefs in classic couch co-op or online play for up to four players. Hold onto your aprons… it’s time to save the world again!

name: Boomerang Fu
description: Slice and dice your friends with boomerangs in this frantic physics party game. Join a crew of your favorite foods as you grill, chill and spill your enemies. Discover ridiculous power-ups and stack them together in deadly combinations.Multiplayer: Other players press "A" on the preparation screen to join.Overview: In this crazy and fun multiplayer physics game, use boomerangs to "slice and dice" your friends. Join your favorite food team and use various methods like grilling, freezing, and slicing to defeat your enemies.Quick Exit: Back + RB (Right Bumper on the controller)Controls:- Dash: A- Throw: Y- Slash: X

name: Off-Road Heroes 4
description: Overview: "Off-Road Heroes 4" includes over 50 car models for players to drive, upgrade, and modify, including the most famous models from rally and extreme motorsport. This series is being rebooted after 16 years, making it a must-play for fans.Quick Exit: Back + RB (Right Bumper on the controller)Controls:Handbrake: B Shift Up: AReset Car: Y Shift Down: XAccelerate: RT Brake: LT

name: Far Cry Primal
description: Overview: In "Far Cry Primal," players take on the role of Takkar, a nomadic hunter striving to rebuild his tribe. From a first-person perspective, players undertake tasks such as tracking and hunting animals, gathering resources, and combating hostile tribes.Quick Exit: Back + RB (Right Bumper on the controller)Controls:Crouch: BJump: A Previous Weapon/Heal (Hold): YInteract: X Quick Attack: RTAim: LT Throw Weapon: RBWeapon Wheel (Hold): LB

name: Mirror's Edge Catalyst
description: Overview: Follow the courageous free runner Faith as she fights for freedom in the city of Glass. Beneath the surface of this elegant and high-tech city lies a terrible secret. Explore every corner, from the dazzling, towering rooftops to the dark, grimy underground tunnels.Quick Exit: Back + RB (Right Bumper on the controller)Controls:Disruptor: B Interact: AHeavy Attack: Y Light Attack: XDash: RT Quick Turn: RBDown Action: LT Up Action: LB

name: Far Cry 3
description: Overview: "Far Cry 3" is an open-world first-person shooter set on a unique island. The island is ruled by a warlord who traffics slaves to extort ransom money from outsiders, and it is heavily armed. You embark on a difficult journey to rescue your friends, only to realize that the only way to escape this hell is to embrace it.Quick Exit: Back + RB (Right Bumper on the controller)Controls:Crouch: B Jump: APrevious Weapon/Heal (Hold): YInteract: X Shoot: RTAim: LT Throw: RBWeapon Wheel (Hold): LB

name: COD6 Modern Warfare
description: Introduction: In the high-definition remastered version of "Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 2", you'll once again fight alongside familiar characters like Soap, Shepard, and Ghost to defeat the terrorist organization led by Vladimir Makarov.Force Quit: Back + RB (Right Bumper on the controller)Controls:Crouch/Prone: B Jump: ASwitch Weapon: Y Use/Reload: XFire: RT (Right Trigger) Aim: LT (Left Trigger)Frag Grenade: RB (Right Bumper) Special Grenade: LB (Left Bumper)

name: Cyberpunk 2077
description: Cyberpunk 2077 is an open world game set in Night City, where the themes of power change and physical transformation remain unchanged. Play the role of an ambitious mercenary: V, pursuing a unique implant - the key to achieving immortality. Customize character avatars, skills, and gameplay to explore a diverse city.

name: Batman™: Arkham Origins
description: As of December 4, 2016, the online services portion of Batman: Arkham Origins will be retired. We thank those that have joined us to battle over the last 3 years. The Single player campaign may still be played and enjoyed offline. For any questions relating to Batman: Arkham Origins, please contact WB

name: Batman™: Arkham Knight
description: Batman™: Arkham Knight brings the award-winning Arkham trilogy from Rocksteady Studios to its epic conclusion. Developed exclusively for New-Gen platforms, Batman: Arkham Knight introduces Rocksteady's uniquely designed version of the Batmobile.

name: Far Cry New Dawn
description: Dive into a transformed vibrant post-apocalyptic Hope County, Montana, 17 years after a global nuclear catastrophe. Lead the fight against the Highwaymen, as they seek to take over the last remaining resources.

name: Tom Clancy's Ghost Recon® Wildlands
description: 【Force Quit】:                 Back + RB (Right Rear Upper Button on the Controller)【Controls】:                Crouch/Prone/Stealth Swim: B                Vault/Parachute: A                Switch Weapon: Y                Reload/Interact/Revive: X                Shoot: RT                                           Aim: LT                Command Wheel: RB                            Use Item: LB                Sprint: LS

name: Resident Evil: Revelations 2
description: [Introduction]: The story of this game takes place between Resident Evil 5 and Resident Evil 6. It reintroduces the "traditional" exploration and puzzle-solving elements from earlier installments in the series, focusing on creating a terrifying and suspenseful atmosphere, making players feel that intense fear of not wanting to move forward.[Force Quit]: Back + RB (Right Back Button on the controller)[Controls]:Cancel: BConfirm: ASwitch character/commands: YPick up/reload ammo: XClose-range attack/fire weapon: RTRaise weapon: LTUse herbs: RB

name: Stardew Valley
description: You've inherited your grandfather's old farm plot in Stardew Valley. Armed with hand-me-down tools and a few coins, you set out to begin your new life. Can you learn to live off the land and turn these overgrown fields into a thriving home?

name: Sekiro: Shadows Die Twice
description: 【Force Quit】: Back + RB (Right Bumper on the controller)【Controls】: Step/Dash (Hold): B     Jump: A    Switch Prosthetic Tools: Y    Action/Attract (Hold): X    Use Prosthetic Tool: RT   Grappling Hook: LT    Attack: RB   Defend: LB    Crouch: LS

name: Attack On Titan2
description: 【Force Quit】: Back + RB (Right Back Button on the controller)【Controls】:Interact: B                                   Jump/Boost: AFire Hook/Attack: Y                                  Swing Movement: XPrepare Sneak Attack: RT                          Switch Item Slot: LTLock onto Titan: RB                                Teammate Action: LB

name: Curse of the Dead Gods
description: Introduction: You seek countless riches, eternal life, and divine power—all pointing to this cursed temple. This seemingly endless labyrinth is filled with deadly traps and monsters.Force Quit: Back + RB (Right Bumper on the controller)Buttons:Two-Handed Weapon: BTorch: ASecondary Weapon: YPrimary Weapon: XDodge: RTBlock: LTEnvironmental Action: RBLock On: RS

name: Bloodstained: Ritual of the Night
description: Introduction: Bloodstained: Ritual of the Night is an exploration-focused, side-scroller action RPG by Koji Igarashi. Play as Miriam, an orphan scarred by an alchemist's curse that slowly crystallizes her body. Battle through a demon-infested castle and defeat its master to save yourself, and all of humanity!Force Quit: Back + RB (Right Bumper on the controller)【Buttons】:Jump: AUse Trigger Shard: YAttack: XBackstep: LBUse Directional Shard: RTUse Effect Shard: RBShortcut: LT

name: Forager
description: The highly popular and quirky "idle game that you want to actively keep playing". Explore, craft, gather & manage resources, find secrets and build your base out of nothing! Buy land to explore and expand!Quick Exit: Back + RB (Right Bumper on the controller)Controls: Main Menu: B Action: A 、Miscellaneous: Y Attack: X

name: Resident Evil 7: Biohazard
description: **Overview**: "Resident Evil 7" is the latest installment in the popular "Resident Evil" series. The game is set in an abandoned farmhouse in the southern United States, where decaying walls exude an atmosphere of terror and isolation. It marks a new era of survival horror experience, featuring a shift to a more terrifying virtual reality mode called "Isolated View."**Controls**:- **Back + RB**: Quick Exit       - **B**: Reload- **A**: Interact                        - **Y**: Open Backpack- **X**: Move Items in Backpack- **RT**: Shoot                         - **LT**: Aim- **RB**: Use First Aid Kit          - **LB**: Defend

name: Titanfall 2
description: "Titanfall 2" is a sci-fi first-person shooter game. The game introduces a brand-new single-player campaign where players will explore the bond between Pilots and Titans. Additionally, players can experience a more thrilling multiplayer mode filled with innovative elements, including six new Titans, expanded customization options, new maps, and game modes, among other features.

name: Watch Dogs 2
description: 【Introduction】: Players take on the role of the young and intelligent hacker Marcus Holloway, arriving at the birthplace of the tech revolution: the San Francisco Bay Area. Join the most notorious hacker group, DedSec, to execute the largest-scale hacking operation in history.【Force Quit】: Back + RB (Right Bumper on the controller)【Controls】:- Melee: B- Cover: A- Interact/Enter Vehicle: Y- Reload/Hold to Control Device: X- Climb/Aim: RT- Hold to Aim: LT- Throw/Mass Hack: RB- Quick Hack: LB- Network Intrusion: RS- Sprint: LS- Phone: START

name: Cuphead
description: "Cuphead" is a retro side scrolling game in the 1930s cartoon style. Players can choose single player mode or cooperate to complete it. In the game, players will travel back and forth to a strange world, obtain new weapons, and learn powerful super mobility abilities.

name: What Remains of Edith Finch
description: Overview: "What Remains of Edith Finch" tells the story of a cursed family in Washington State. Players take on the role of Edith Finch, exploring the Finch family home to uncover the mystery of her lineage and why she is the last remaining member of her family.Quick Exit: Back + RB (Right Bumper on the controller)Controls:Interact: RT/RBZoom In: LT/LBMove: Left Stick

name: Untitled Goose Game
description: "Untitled Goose Game" is a farm themed comedy game. The game begins in a quiet and peaceful village. On a lovely morning, our big goose begins its escape and mischief plan, and you have to play the role of this free spirited big goose. Being in a village that has not yet realized this.

name: Rise of the Tomb Raider
description: Rise of the Tomb Raider: 20 Year Celebration includes the base game and Season Pass featuring all-new content. Explore Croft Manor in the new “Blood Ties” story, then defend it against a zombie invasion in “Lara’s Nightmare”.

name: Katana ZERO
description: "Katana ZERO" is an indie game developed by Askiisoft. The game features fast-paced, stylish combat and a classic 80s-inspired visual style. The combat is incredibly flashy, with the player controlling a skilled samurai who can even deflect bullets. Slashing through enemies in a dazzling display of swordplay feels immensely satisfying. The game's synthwave soundtrack perfectly complements its 80s retro aesthetic, and the character designs are striking and memorable.

name: Wizard of Legend
description: A Roguelike action game focused on fast-paced spellcasting combat. You will explore randomly generated dungeons, swiftly navigate through dazzling and fantastical spells, repeatedly challenge powerful lords, and gradually ascend to the title of Archmage!

name: One Piece: Burning Blood
description: Online Play: The online interface is unlocked after completing the sixth level.Force Quit: Back + RB (Right Bumper on the controller)Buttons:Guard/Back: BJump/Confirm: AOrange Special Skill: YAttack: XSwitch Character: RT/LTAbility Unlock: RBSwitch Map: LB

name: Ori and the Will of the Wisps
description: "Ori and the Will of the Wisps" is a Metroidvania-style platform adventure game developed by Moon Studios. This game is the sequel to the 2015 release "Ori and the Blind Forest." In this installment, embark on a new adventure to explore the mysteries hidden behind the Nibel forest, uncover lost truths, and reveal Ori's true destiny.

name: Hades
description: 【Introduction】: Defy the god of the dead as you hack and slash out of the Underworld in this rogue-like dungeon crawler from the creators of Bastion, Transistor, and Pyre.【Force Quit】: Back + RB (Right Bumper on the controller)【Controls】:Throw Bomb: B、Dash: A、Special Attack: Y、Normal Attack: X、Call for Help: RT、Summon: LT、Interact: RB、Reload: RS、Open Manuscript: LB

name: Ace Combat 7: Skies Unknown
description: Introduction: "Ace Combat 7" is a first-person flight shooting game developed by Bandai and is the latest installment in the popular "Ace Combat" series. This game will showcase beautiful sky scenery and cities to the players, with revolutionary advancements in graphics. In addition to the visual presentation, the game will feature numerous new vehicles, and the game system has undergone many changes.Force Quit: Back + RB (Right Rear Button on the controller)Controls: Missile/Weapon Fire: B     Gun Fire: A    Target Switch: Y    Weapon Switch: X                     Accelerate: RT   Decelerate: LT     Left Roll: LB     Right Roll: RB

name: Witchers 3
description: You are Geralt of Rivia, mercenary monster slayer. Before you stands a war-torn, monster-infested continent you can explore at will. Your current contract? Tracking down Ciri — the Child of Prophecy, a living weapon that can alter the shape of the world.

name: Terminator: Resistance
description:
SEE PICTURES FOR LANGUAGE CHANGE

The game “Terminator: Resistance” is set 30 years after Judgment Day
 in a ravaged future Los Angeles.Players will take on the role of Private Jacob Rivers, joining the Los Angeles resistancein their fight against Skynet. As players progress through the game,they will gradually discover that they are actually Skynet’s latest target.

name: NieR:Automata™
description: NieR: Automata tells the story of androids 2B, 9S and A2 and their battle to reclaim the machine-driven dystopia overrun by powerful machines.

name: Ori and the Blind Forest
description: "Ori and the Blind Forest" is a side-scrolling adventure game developed by the independent studio Moon Studios. In the game, players take on the role of a guardian spirit named Ori. Long ago, Ori fell into a forest and was adopted by a bear-like creature. However, an evil presence named Kuro emerges, taking away Ori's adoptive mother and forcing Ori to explore the dark forest alone.

name: Dragon Ball Z: Kakarot
description: 【Introduction】: In "Dragon Ball Z: Kakarot," you can experience the story of Goku and other Z warriors! Besides epic battles, you can also engage in activities like fighting, fishing, dining, and training with characters such as Goku, Gohan, and Vegeta in the Dragon Ball Z world. Feel free to explore new areas, experience the adventure activities in the story, and deepen your bonds with other Dragon Ball Z heroes.【Force Quit】: Back + RB (Right bumper on the controller)【Controls】: Ki Blast: X + LT     Charge/Surge: Y    Support Palette: RB                     Step Movement: A     Melee Attack: B    Switch Map: BACK                 Super Attack Palette: LB    Guard: LT

name: For The King
description: For The King is a strategic RPG game that combines elements of board games and roguelike genres, offering a cross-domain experience. It can be played online or offline, providing both single-player and multiplayer cooperative gameplay.In this thrilling adventure pack, explore mysterious jungle waterfalls and uncover the secrets of an ancient civilization

name: Assassin’s Creed: Odyssey
description: 【按键】：crounch：B     run：A    Interact/assassinate：Y    Dodge：X                     Hard Attack/arrow/Drop：RT   Aim/Long-Range：LT                     Close Combat：LB   Light Attack/Cancel Shooting：RB

name: Resident Evil 2: Remake
description: The genre-defining masterpiece Resident Evil 2 returns, completely rebuilt from the ground up for a deeper narrative experience. Using Capcom’s proprietary RE Engine, Resident Evil 2 offers a fresh take on the classic survival horror saga with breathtakingly realistic visuals, heart-pounding immersive audio, a new over-the-shoulder camera, and modernized controls on top of gameplay modes from the original game.In Resident Evil 2, the classic action, tense exploration, and puzzle solving gameplay that defined the Resident Evil series returns. Players join rookie police officer Leon Kennedy and college student Claire Redfield, who are thrust together by a disastrous outbreak in Raccoon City that transformed its population into deadly zombies. Both Leon and Claire have their own separate playable campaigns, allowing players to see the story from both characters’ perspectives. The fate of these two fan favorite characters is in players hands as they work together to survive and get to the bottom of what is behind the terrifying attack on the city. Will they make it out alive?A spine-chilling reimagining of a horror classic - Based on the original release in 1998, the new game has been completely rebuilt from the ground up for a deeper narrative experience.A whole new perspective – New over-the-shoulder camera mode and modernized control scheme creates a more modern take on the survival horror experience and offers players a trip down memory lane with the original gameplay modes from the 1998 release.Terrifyingly realistic visuals – Built on Capcom’s proprietary RE Engine, Resident Evil 2 delivers breathtakingly photorealistic visuals whilst stunning lighting creates an up-close, intense and atmospheric experience as players roam the corridors of the Raccoon City Police Department (RPD).Face the grotesque hordes – Zombies are brought to life with a horrifyingly realistic wet gore effect as they react in real time taking instant visible damage, making every bullet count.Iconic series defining gameplay – Engage in frenzied combat with enemies, explore dark menacing corridors, solve puzzles to access areas and collect and use items discovered around the environment in a terrifying constant fight for survival.See favorite characters in a whole new light - Join rookie police officer Leon S. Kennedy on his first day in the job and college student Claire Redfield, who is searching for her brother amidst a terrifying zombie epidemic.Step into the rookie shoes of both heroes - Enjoy separately playable campaigns for both Leon and Claire, allowing players to see the story from both characters’ perspective.

name: Devil May Cry 5
description: 【Introduction】: The strongest demon hunter makes a powerful return! Surpassing the sense of reality. "Strongest," "Innovative," "Royal Road"—three different combat styles. All the thrills of action games are gathered here!【Force Quit】: Back + RB (Right Back Button on the controller)【Controls】: Jump: A    Melee Attack: Y    Ranged Attack: X    Switch Lock-On Target: LS                  Lock-On Target: RB   Use EXCEED: LT    Reset Camera: RS

name: FINAL FANTASY VII REMAKE INTERGRADE
description: "FINAL FANTASY VII REMAKE" is meticulously crafted by the core team behind the original 1997 release of "FINAL FANTASY VII."This timeless masterpiece, beloved by countless players for its gripping story, captivating characters, and cutting-edge graphics of its time, has now been reborn as a "new story."The command-based combat system is seamlessly integrated with an intuitive action system, offering deeper strategic possibilities. Combined with modern CG technology, it brings the immersive world of "FINAL FANTASY VII" to life once again.

name: How to Train Your Dragon: Dawn of New Riders
description: In "How to Train Your Dragon: Dawn of New Riders," players control new characters and team up with familiar faces like Hiccup and their beloved dragons to defeat Eir, who is using dragons for evil schemes.

name: American Fugitive
description: 【Introduction】The game is set in the Deep South of the United States in the 1980s. In the game, you will play as Will Riley. He's not a good guy, but he's not a serial killer either. However, someone has locked you up on the charge of murdering your father.【Force Quit】: Back + RB (the upper right button on the back of the controller)【Buttons】: Minor Interaction: X Interaction / Enter Vehicle: Y Run / Handbrake: A Crouch / Drag: B

name: Baldur's Gate 3
description: Longer loading, please wait.Baldur's Gate 3 is a highly acclaimed turn - based computer role - playing game. The game is set on the continent of Faerûn in the "Forgotten Realms" of Dungeons & Dragons, where races such as deities, demons, elves, dwarves, and humans coexist. Baldur's Gate is a portal connecting different worlds, and the continent is in a desperate situation, being hijacked and infected by Mind Flayer tadpoles.

name: Devil May Cry 4
description: Devil May Cry 4" is an action game developed and published by Capcom. In this game, Dante, the protagonist of the previous installment, will take a backseat, and a wild and unrestrained young man will be the new face of this game.

name: Dead Cells
description: Dead Cells is a critically acclaimed rogue-lite, metroidvania-inspired action-platformer developed by Motion Twin. Released in 2018, the game combines fast-paced combat, challenging gameplay, and procedurally generated levels to create a unique and addictive experience.In Dead Cells, players take on the role of a mysterious prisoner who controls a reanimated corpse, known as the "Prisoner." The game is set on a cursed island plagued by a mysterious disease called the Malaise. As the Prisoner, players must fight their way through a series of procedurally generated levels, battling grotesque creatures and powerful bosses, to uncover the island's dark secrets and ultimately escape.

name: PES 2017
description: "Multiplayer: To start a match, select 'MATCH', then 'PLAY MATCH', and choose your side."Pro Evolution Soccer 2017 will be developed using the FOX engine, featuring a "realistic ball control" mechanism, enhanced graphics, and fully scanned models. The game will also include a dynamic AI system that changes based on user input.

name: Final Fantasy XIII
description: Set on the primordial land of "Pulse," Final Fantasy XIII tells the story of the "L'Cie," chosen by the "Fal'Cie" and branded as enemies of the world. The narrative explores their complex relationships and their collective struggle against an unfortunate fate.

name: Transformers: Rise of the Dark Spark
description: Transformers: Rise of the Dark Spark is the sequel to Activision's first two Transformers games, War for Cybertron and Fall of Cybertron. The game's main storyline revolves around the search for the "Dark Spark," an ancient artifact of immense power. Similar to its predecessors, it features parallel storylines for both the Autobots and Decepticons, and retains the fast-paced run-and-gun combat style characteristic of the Cybertron series.Force Quit: Back + RB (Right Bumper on the controller)

name: Hollow Knight
description: Forge your own path in Hollow Knight! An epic action adventure through a vast ruined kingdom of insects and heroes. Explore twisting caverns, battle tainted creatures and befriend bizarre bugs, all in a classic, hand-drawn 2D style.
